full_text:
The ridge of high pressure responsible for the record West heat will start to shift eastward, putting hundreds of records in jeopardy from the Plains to the Deep South Friday, Saturday and Sunday. The heat will peak this weekend with highs soaring into the 80s and 90s for millions. Watch this video to see how warm it will get in your city.
